---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature, DSP block, or tool improvement
title: '[Feature]: '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

### 🎯 Goal / Problem Statement
What problem is this feature solving, or what functionality is missing? (e.g. "Support QPSK carrier recovery loop in explainable demodulator").

### 📋 Proposed Solution
Describe the solution or new capability you would like to see added.

### 💻 Implementation Context / DSP Details
If proposing a new DSP block or demodulator mode:
* What is the mathematical formula or algorithm?
* Are there any reference code snippets or GNU Radio blocks we should look at?
